title: HuBMAP TMC-Florida/Zurich CODEX Modality Overview
author: Marda Jorgensen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.be9pjh5n
materials: Validate antibodies in all target tissue types by IHC using DAB Staining: https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdiei4be
Stain coverslips with Akoya invertoried antibodies. Staining: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbsdina6
Make CODEX bar coded reporter trays. Preparation: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bc2riyd6

steps.title: Process donor organs into samples for analysis. Lymph Node
steps.instruction: Process donor organs into samples for analysis. Lymph Node: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbgnijve Thymus: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bbgmiju6 Spleen: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bc3kiykw

steps.title: Register organ donor, organs received and...
steps.instruction: Register organ donor, organs received and common coordinate region information in the HuBMAP UUID generator at https://uuid.hubmapconsortium.org .

steps.title: Prepare paraffin blocks from tissue samples
steps.instruction: Prepare paraffin blocks from tissue samples. Cassette Processing: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8nzhvf6 Paraffin Embedding: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bam9ic96

steps.title: Prepare H&E sections for histopathological assessment
steps.instruction: Prepare H&E sections for histopathological assessment. Sectioning: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bahdib26 H&E Staining: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.beamjac6

steps.title: Coat coverslips with Poly-L-Lysine. Coverslip Preparation
steps.instruction: Coat coverslips with Poly-L-Lysine. Coverslip Preparation: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.baxyifpw

steps.title: Cut and mount sections for CODEX analysis. Sectioning
steps.instruction: Cut and mount sections for CODEX analysis. Sectioning: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.basdiea6

steps.title: Perform multiplex data acquisition using CODEX robot and Keyence microscope
steps.instruction: Perform multiplex data acquisition using CODEX robot and Keyence microscope. Acquisition: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdifi4bn

steps.title: Transfer images to analysis computer and perform CODEX processing
steps.instruction: Transfer images to analysis computer and perform CODEX processing. Codex_Processor.docx

steps.title: ​Register completed CODEX section information in...
steps.instruction: ​Register completed CODEX section information in the HuBMAP UUID generator at https://uuid.hubmapconsortium.org .

steps.title: Prepare and upload data to the...
steps.instruction: Prepare and upload data to the HuBMAP HIVE Globus using hipergator. Datasets to HiperGator-Globus.docx
